targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, close as "VOO"
FROM prices
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND symbol = 'VOO'
  AND (granularity = 'daily' OR time >= CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY time

SELECT time, close as "^DJI"
FROM prices
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND symbol = '^DJI'
  AND (granularity = 'daily' OR time >= CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY time
